description: A quote-card graphic on a solid blue gradient background. At the top-center is a circular headshot of a smiling woman with long dark hair in a dark blazer over a white top, in front of an American flag. The center holds a large white serif quote framed by light-blue quotation marks: 'Since Jan. 20, HSI has arrested more than 1,000 illegal workers and proposed over $1 million in fines against businesses that exploit and hire illegal workers.' Beneath it an attribution reads '- MADISON SHEAHAN, ICE Deputy Director'. The lower-right corner bears the DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: Since Jan. 20, HSI has arrested more than 1,000 illegal workers and proposed over $1 million in fines against businesses that exploit and hire illegal workers.; MADISON SHEAHAN, ICE Deputy Director
